---
title: "quarto-chevrons"
subtitle: "Circular flow diagrams for Quarto presentations"
toc: false
---

`quarto-chevrons` is a Quarto extension that adds circular flow diagrams to Reveal.js presentations. Items are arranged in a circle with customizable node shapes and arrow types.

## Installation

```bash
quarto add EmilHvitfeldt/quarto-chevrons
```

## Basic Usage

Activate the extension in your document YAML:

```yaml
filters:
  - circle-flow
```

Then use the `circle-flow` div with nested `item` divs:

````markdown
::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::
````

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::

## Item Count

The layout automatically adjusts to any number of items. With a single item there is no arrow.

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
:::

With two items, arrows are offset so they don't overlap.

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
:::

Three or more items are arranged evenly around the circle.

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

Node size scales down automatically as more items are added.

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
::: item
Ethan
:::
:::

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
::: item
Ethan
:::
::: item
Fiona
:::
:::

## What's Next

- [Node Shapes](node-shapes.qmd) — circle, box, and text-only nodes
- [Arrow Types](arrow-types.qmd) — chevron, curved, thin, ring, arc, and double arrows
- [Colors](colors.qmd) — global and per-node color control
- [Customization](customization.qmd) — full class and attribute reference
